title: russelia standleyi
intro: Russelia standleyi, also known as Queen of the Night or Coral Fountain, is a flowering plant native to Central America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. Its health benefits include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and acting as an antiseptic. Russelia standleyi can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
